---
title: "CogDrisk and LIBRA2 Complete Case Analysis - PREVENT-AD"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')
source(COGD_RECODE_FN)
source(LIBRA_RECODE_FN)
```

```{r load_data}
# Load CRS factors (non-imputed and imputed)
crs_factors <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_crsfactors.rds"))
crs_factors_imputed <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_crsfactors_imputed.rds"))

# Load scored risk scores
cogd_scored <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_cogd_scored.rds"))
cogd_original_scored <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_cogd_original_scored.rds"))
libra_scored <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_libra2_scored.rds"))
libra_original_scored <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_libra2_original_scored.rds"))

dat_cogd <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_cogd_original.rds"))
dat_cogd_imp <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_cogd.rds"))
dat_libra <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_libra2_original.rds"))
dat_libra_imp <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_libra2.rds"))
```

## Missing Data Visualization - CogDrisk
```{r cogdrisk_missing_viz, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# Select only CogDrisk variables
dat_cogd_vars <- dat_cogd %>%
  select(CONP_ID, all_of(cogdrisk_vars))

# Calculate missing data summary
missing_summary <- crs_factors %>%
  select(-CONP_ID) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "N_Missing") %>%
  mutate(Percent_Missing = round((N_Missing / nrow(dat_cogd)) * 100, 2)) %>%
  arrange(desc(N_Missing))

# Bar plot of missing data by variable
p1 <- ggplot(missing_summary, aes(x = reorder(Variable, N_Missing), y = N_Missing)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(N_Missing, " (", Percent_Missing, "%)")),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Missing Data by Variable",
       x = "Variable",
       y = "Number of Missing Values") +
  theme_minimal() +
  ylim(0, max(cogd_missing_summary$N_Missing) * 1.2)

print(p1)
ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_CogDrisk_missing.png"), p1)

# Heatmap of missing data patterns
missing_pattern_data <- dat_cogd_vars %>%
  select(-CONP_ID) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~is.na(.))) %>%
  mutate(participant_id = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -participant_id, names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Missing") %>%
  filter(Missing == TRUE)

if(nrow(missing_pattern_data) > 0) {
  p2 <- ggplot(missing_pattern_data, aes(x = Variable, y = participant_id)) +
    geom_tile(fill = "red", alpha = 0.7) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(title = "CogDrisk: Missing Data Pattern Heatmap",
         x = "Variable",
         y = "Participant") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))

  print(p2)
}

# Print summary table
cat("\nCogDrisk Missing Data Summary:\n")
print(cogd_missing_summary)
```

# CogDrisk Analysis
```{r cogdrisk_data}
# Prepare CogDrisk data from crs_factors
dat_cogd <- prepare_preventad_cogdrisk(crs_factors, verbose = FALSE)
dat_cogd_imp <- prepare_preventad_cogdrisk(crs_factors_imputed, verbose = FALSE)

# CogDrisk variables for scoring
cogdrisk_vars <- c("Sex", "Education_level", "Hypertension", "BMI_category",
                   "High_cholesterol", "Depression", "Atrial_fibrillation",
                   "Diabetes", "TBI", "Smoking", "Cognitive_engagement",
                   "Social_engagement", "Physical_inactivity")
```

## Missing Data Visualization - CogDrisk
```{r cogdrisk_missing_viz, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# Select only CogDrisk variables
dat_cogd_vars <- dat_cogd %>%
  select(CONP_ID, all_of(cogdrisk_vars))

# Calculate missing data summary
cogd_missing_summary <- dat_cogd_vars %>%
  select(-CONP_ID) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "N_Missing") %>%
  mutate(Percent_Missing = round((N_Missing / nrow(dat_cogd)) * 100, 2)) %>%
  arrange(desc(N_Missing))

# Bar plot of missing data by variable
p1 <- ggplot(cogd_missing_summary, aes(x = reorder(Variable, N_Missing), y = N_Missing)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(N_Missing, " (", Percent_Missing, "%)")),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "CogDrisk: Missing Data by Variable",
       x = "Variable",
       y = "Number of Missing Values") +
  theme_minimal() +
  ylim(0, max(cogd_missing_summary$N_Missing) * 1.2)

print(p1)
ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_CogDrisk_missing.png"), p1)

# Heatmap of missing data patterns
missing_pattern_data <- dat_cogd_vars %>%
  select(-CONP_ID) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~is.na(.))) %>%
  mutate(participant_id = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -participant_id, names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Missing") %>%
  filter(Missing == TRUE)

if(nrow(missing_pattern_data) > 0) {
  p2 <- ggplot(missing_pattern_data, aes(x = Variable, y = participant_id)) +
    geom_tile(fill = "red", alpha = 0.7) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(title = "CogDrisk: Missing Data Pattern Heatmap",
         x = "Variable",
         y = "Participant") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))

  print(p2)
}

# Print summary table
cat("\nCogDrisk Missing Data Summary:\n")
print(cogd_missing_summary)
```

## Complete CogDrisk Cases
```{r complete_cogd}
# Complete cases
complete_cogd <- dat_cogd %>%
  filter(complete.cases(select(., all_of(cogdrisk_vars))))

cat(sprintf("\nComplete cases: %d / %d (%.1f%%)\n",
            nrow(complete_cogd),
            nrow(dat_cogd),
            (nrow(complete_cogd) / nrow(dat_cogd)) * 100))
```

## Comparing Complete Cases vs Imputed Data - CogDrisk
```{r cogdrisk_comparison}
# Dataframe of scores comparing complete cases vs imputed
df2 <- cogd_original_scored %>%
  select(CONP_ID, original_score = score_cogd) %>%
  # Join with imputed scored data
  left_join((cogd_scored %>%
               select(CONP_ID, imputed_score = score_cogd)),
            by = "CONP_ID")

# Pivot longer for ggplot
df2_longer <- df2 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(original_score, imputed_score),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "score_value"
  ) 

# SD ratio and Wilcox test
var_ratio <- sd(df2$imputed_score, na.rm = TRUE) / sd(df2$original_score, na.rm = TRUE)
wilcox_result <- wilcox.test(df2$original_score, df2$imputed_score, paired = FALSE)

cat(sprintf("SD ratio (imputed vs complete): %.3f\n", var_ratio))
cat(sprintf("Wilcoxon test p-value: %.4f\n", wilcox_result$p.value))

plot1 <- ggplot(df2_longer, aes(x = method, y = score_value, fill = method)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(c("original_score", "imputed_score")),
    method = "wilcox.test"
  ) +
  labs(subtitle = paste0("SD ratio (imputed vs complete) = ", round(var_ratio, 3)),
       x = "Method",
       y = "CogDrisk Score") +
  ggtitle("CogDrisk: Complete Cases vs Imputed Data") +
  theme_minimal()

print(plot1)
ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "CogD_imputation_comparison.png"), plot1, width = 8, height = 6)
```

# LIBRA2 Analysis
```{r libra_data}
# Prepare LIBRA2 data from crs_factors
dat_libra <- prepare_preventad_libra(crs_factors, verbose = FALSE)
dat_libra_imp <- prepare_preventad_libra(crs_factors_imputed, verbose = FALSE)

# LIBRA2 variables for scoring
libra_vars <- c("Hypertension", "Hypercholesterolemia", "Obesity",
                "Diabetes", "Depression", "Smoking", "Cognitive_activity",
                "Physical_activity")
```

## Missing Data Visualization - LIBRA2
```{r libra_missing_viz, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# Select only LIBRA2 variables
dat_libra_vars <- dat_libra %>%
  select(CONP_ID, all_of(libra_vars))

# Calculate missing data summary
libra_missing_summary <- dat_libra_vars %>%
  select(-CONP_ID) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "N_Missing") %>%
  mutate(Percent_Missing = round((N_Missing / nrow(dat_libra)) * 100, 2)) %>%
  arrange(desc(N_Missing))

# Bar plot of missing data by variable
p3 <- ggplot(libra_missing_summary, aes(x = reorder(Variable, N_Missing), y = N_Missing)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "darkgreen") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(N_Missing, " (", Percent_Missing, "%)")),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "LIBRA2: Missing Data by Variable",
       x = "Variable",
       y = "Number of Missing Values") +
  theme_minimal() +
  ylim(0, max(libra_missing_summary$N_Missing) * 1.2)

print(p3)

# Heatmap of missing data patterns
missing_pattern_data_libra <- dat_libra_vars %>%
  select(-CONP_ID) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~is.na(.))) %>%
  mutate(participant_id = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -participant_id, names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Missing") %>%
  filter(Missing == TRUE)

if(nrow(missing_pattern_data_libra) > 0) {
  p4 <- ggplot(missing_pattern_data_libra, aes(x = Variable, y = participant_id)) +
    geom_tile(fill = "darkred", alpha = 0.7) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(title = "LIBRA2: Missing Data Pattern Heatmap",
         x = "Variable",
         y = "Participant") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))

  print(p4)
}

# Print summary table
cat("\nLIBRA2 Missing Data Summary:\n")
print(libra_missing_summary)
```

## Complete LIBRA2 Cases

```{r complete_libra}
# Complete cases
complete_libra <- dat_libra %>%
  filter(complete.cases(select(., all_of(libra_vars))))

cat(sprintf("\nComplete cases: %d / %d (%.1f%%)\n",
            nrow(complete_libra),
            nrow(dat_libra),
            (nrow(complete_libra) / nrow(dat_libra)) * 100))
```

## Comparing Complete Cases vs Imputed Data - LIBRA2
```{r libra_comparison}
# Dataframe of scores comparing complete cases vs imputed
df_libra <- libra_original_scored %>%
  select(CONP_ID, original_score = score_libra2) %>%
  # Join with imputed scored data
  left_join((libra_scored %>%
               select(CONP_ID, imputed_score = score_libra2)),
            by = "CONP_ID")

# Pivot longer for ggplot
df_libra_longer <- df_libra %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(original_score, imputed_score),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "score_value"
  ) 

# SD ratio and Wilcox test
var_ratio_libra <- sd(df_libra$imputed_score, na.rm = TRUE) / sd(df_libra$original_score, na.rm = TRUE)
wilcox_result_libra <- wilcox.test(df_libra$original_score, df_libra$imputed_score, paired = FALSE)

cat(sprintf("SD ratio (imputed vs complete): %.3f\n", var_ratio_libra))
cat(sprintf("Wilcoxon test p-value: %.4f\n", wilcox_result_libra$p.value))

plot_libra <- ggplot(df_libra_longer, aes(x = method, y = score_value, fill = method)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(c("Complete cases only", "Imputed (all data)")),
    method = "wilcox.test"
  ) +
  labs(subtitle = paste0("SD ratio (imputed vs complete) = ", round(var_ratio_libra, 3)),
       x = "Method",
       y = "LIBRA2 Score") +
  ggtitle("LIBRA2: Complete Cases vs Imputed Data") +
  theme_minimal()

print(plot_libra)
ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "LIBRA_imputation_comparison.png"), plot_libra, width = 8, height = 6)
```

# Summary Statistics

```{r summary_stats}
cat("\n=== Summary ===\n")
cat(sprintf("CogDrisk - Total: %d, Complete cases: %d (%.1f%%)\n",
            nrow(dat_cogd),
            nrow(complete_cogd),
            (nrow(complete_cogd) / nrow(dat_cogd)) * 100))

cat(sprintf("LIBRA2 - Total: %d, Complete cases: %d (%.1f%%)\n",
            nrow(dat_libra),
            nrow(complete_libra),
            (nrow(complete_libra) / nrow(dat_libra)) * 100))
```
